# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for a complete GCP application stack (Compute Engine, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure. Skip Cloud Logging and Monitoring configuration to reduce complexity in our initial MVP deployment.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

resources:
  - name: my-instance-group
    type: compute.v1.instanceGroup
    properties:
      zone: us-central1-a
      instanceTemplate: $(ref.my-instance-template.selfLink)
      namedPorts:
        - name: http
          port: 80

  - name: my-instance-template
    type: compute.v1.instanceTemplate
    properties:
      properties:
        machineType: n1-standard-1
        disks:
          - boot: true
            autoDelete: true
            initializeParams:
              sourceImage: projects/debian-cloud/global/images/debian-10-buster-v20201014
        networkInterfaces:
          - network: $(ref.my-network.selfLink)
            accessConfigs:
              - name: External NAT
                type: ONE_TO_ONE_NAT
        tags:
          items:
            - http-server

  - name: my-network
    type: compute.v1.network
    properties:
      autoCreateSubnetworks: false

  - name: my-subnetwork
    type: compute.v1.subnetwork
    properties:
      region: us-central1
      network: $(ref.my-network.selfLink)
      ipCidrRange: 10.0.0.0/20

  - name: my-cloud-sql-instance
    type: sqladmin.v1.instance
    properties:
      region: us-central1
      databaseVersion: MYSQL_5_7
      settings:
        tier: db-f1-micro
        ipConfiguration:
          enablePrivateIp: false
          authorizedNetworks:
            - value: 0.0.0.0/0
  
  - name: my-cloud-storage-bucket
    type: storage.v1.bucket
    properties:
      name: my-app-storage-bucket
      location: US
      storageClass: STANDARD

  - name: my-http-health-check
    type: compute.v1.healthCheck
    properties:
      type: HTTP
      requestPath: /
      checkIntervalSec: 30
      timeoutSec: 10
      healthyThreshold: 2
      unhealthyThreshold: 2

  - name: my-backend-service
    type: compute.v1.backendService
    properties:
      healthChecks:
        - $(ref.my-http-health-check.selfLink)
      backends:
        - group: $(ref.my-instance-group.selfLink)
      portName: http
      protocol: HTTP

  - name: my-forwarding-rule
    type: compute.v1.globalForwardingRule
    properties:
      backendService: $(ref.my-backend-service.selfLink)
      IPAddress: $(ref.my-global-address.selfLink)
      portRange: 80
      target: $(ref.my-target-http-proxy.selfLink)

  - name: my-global-address
    type: compute.v1.globalAddress
    properties:
      name: my-global-ip

  - name: my-target-http-proxy
    type: compute.v1.targetHttpProxy
    properties:
      urlMap: $(ref.my-url-map.selfLink)

  - name: my-url-map
    type: compute.v1.urlMap
    properties:
      defaultService: $(ref.my-backend-service.selfLink)
      hostRules:
        - hosts:
            - '*'
          pathMatcher: my-path-matcher

  - name: my-path-matcher
    type: compute.v1.pathMatcher
    properties:
      defaultService: $(ref.my-backend-service.selfLink)
      pathRules:
        - paths:
            - /*
          service: $(ref.my-backend-service.selfLink)
